/images/regions/jerusalem/western-wall.j.author: Israel Government Press Office (IGPO archive)
/images/regions/jerusalem/western-wall.j.restrictedSiteAcknowledgment: IGPO archive image — pre-cleared per Wikimedia Israel partnership 2017. Wide architectural plaza shot; no identifiable worshippers. Commercial photography at the Western Wall otherwise requires Western Wall Heritage Foundation permit per PITFALLS §5.4.

/images/regions/jerusalem/holy-sepulchre.author: Gerd Eichmann (Wikimedia Commons)
/images/regions/jerusalem/holy-sepulchre.restrictedSiteAcknowledgment: Wikimedia Commons wide architectural exterior shot of the Church of the Holy Sepulchre forecourt — no identifiable worshippers, no liturgical/Status Quo interior. CC-BY-SA-4.0 license confirmed via Wikimedia entry. Status Quo of 1852 governs interior access across the six denominations sharing the site.

Commercial commissioning gated on press@bahai.org written permission per Phase 6 milestone.
